Package com.wip.entity

Class Shipment

java.lang.Object
com.wip.entity.Shipment
@Entity public class Shipment extends Object
JPA entity representing a shipment dispatched for a parcel in the courier tracking system.

Mapped to the shipment database table, this entity records the logistics details of a dispatched parcel, including a system-generated unique tracking number, the shipment dispatch date, current geographic location, and the expected delivery date. Each shipment is tied to exactly one Parcel and may accumulate multiple TrackingUpdate entries over its lifecycle. Cascade ALL and orphan removal on tracking updates ensure consistency when a shipment is deleted.

Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Rohith Varma K

  • Method Details

    • getShipmentId

      public Long getShipmentId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this shipment.
      Returns:
      the auto-generated shipment ID

    • setShipmentId

      public void setShipmentId(Long shipmentId)
      Sets the unique identifier of this shipment.
      Parameters:
      shipmentId - the shipment ID to assign

    • getTrackingNumber

      public String getTrackingNumber()
      Returns the unique tracking number for this shipment.
      Returns:
      the tracking number string

    • setTrackingNumber

      public void setTrackingNumber(String trackingNumber)
      Sets the unique tracking number for this shipment.
      Parameters:
      trackingNumber - the tracking number to assign

    • getShipmentDate

      public LocalDate getShipmentDate()
      Returns the dispatch date of this shipment.
      Returns:
      the shipment date as a LocalDate

    • setShipmentDate

      public void setShipmentDate(LocalDate shipmentDate)
      Sets the dispatch date of this shipment.
      Parameters:
      shipmentDate - the dispatch date to assign

    • getCurrentLocation

      public String getCurrentLocation()
      Returns the current geographic location of this shipment.
      Returns:
      a string describing the current location during transit

    • setCurrentLocation

      public void setCurrentLocation(String currentLocation)
      Sets the current geographic location of this shipment.
      Parameters:
      currentLocation - the current location string to assign

    • getEstimatedDeliveryDate

      public LocalDate getEstimatedDeliveryDate()
      Returns the estimated delivery date for this shipment.
      Returns:
      the estimated delivery date as a LocalDate

    • setEstimatedDeliveryDate

      public void setEstimatedDeliveryDate(LocalDate estimatedDeliveryDate)
      Sets the estimated delivery date for this shipment.
      Parameters:
      estimatedDeliveryDate - the estimated delivery date to assign

    • getParcel

      public Parcel getParcel()
      Returns the Parcel linked to this shipment.
      Returns:
      the associated parcel, or null if not set

    • setParcel

      public void setParcel(Parcel parcel)
      Sets the Parcel linked to this shipment.
      Parameters:
      parcel - the parcel to associate with this shipment

    • getCreatedBy

      public AppUser getCreatedBy()
      Returns the AppUser who created this shipment record.
      Returns:
      the user who created this shipment, or null if not set

    • setCreatedBy

      public void setCreatedBy(AppUser createdBy)
      Sets the AppUser who created this shipment record.
      Parameters:
      createdBy - the user responsible for creating this shipment

    • getTrackingUpdates

      public List<TrackingUpdate> getTrackingUpdates()
      Returns the list of TrackingUpdate events for this shipment.
      Returns:
      an ordered list of tracking update records, may be empty

    • setTrackingUpdates

      public void setTrackingUpdates(List<TrackingUpdate> trackingUpdates)
      Sets the list of TrackingUpdate events for this shipment.
      Parameters:
      trackingUpdates - the list of tracking updates to associate
